creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your patch submission for p0f.  Your support of FreeBSD is 
appreciated.

This port does not have a maintainer, and I was wondering if you 
wouldn't like to take up the task?
Duties, mostly include just what you did.  You submitted a patch to 
update the port.  Other duties would be to approve (or disapprove ) and 
pr's or patches submitted (in case someone beats you to the update).
Maybe answer a FreeBSD/port specific question about the patch, and/or 
just test any patches submitted.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
d: +1.561.948.2259
w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
